description: You are a meteorological routing analyst for a modern wind-assisted cargo vessel planning a transatlantic crossing in September. Identify the exact position of the 'doldrums' (equatorial low-pressure trough) using NASA Panoply and the Sea Level Pressure climatology dataset (~/PanoplyData/slp.mon.ltm.nc) as specified in the routing mandate (~/Desktop/routing_request.txt). Export the September analysis map and the structured doldrums crossing report to ~/Documents/SailRouting/.
